outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility expected due to heavily positive GEX across all expirations.
outlook.summary: The market is pinned directly beneath massive triple-expiry Call Resonance levels at 27400 and 27500. With a highly positive Total GEX (2.94B), Market Makers are long gamma, which will naturally suppress volatility and cap upward momentum. While the 0DTE skew shows short-term bullish euphoria, the structural Call walls and a massive monthly Call anchor at 26700 create a distinct downward magnetic pull. Expect tight range-bound price action with strong resistance overhead.
